시편 116:1.content: I love Yahweh, because he listens to my voice, and my cries for mercy.

시편 116:2.content: Because he has turned his ear to me, therefore I will call on him as long as I live.

시편 116:3.content: The cords of death surrounded me, the pains of Sheol got a hold of me. I found trouble and sorrow.

시편 116:4.content: Then I called on Yahweh’s name: “Yahweh, I beg you, deliver my soul.”

시편 116:5.content: Yahweh is Gracious and righteous. Yes, our God is merciful.

시편 116:6.content: Yahweh preserves the simple. I was brought low, and he saved me.

시편 116:7.content: Return to your rest, my soul, for Yahweh has dealt bountifully with you.

시편 116:8.content: For you have delivered my soul from death, my eyes from tears, and my feet from falling.

시편 116:9.content: I will walk before Yahweh in the land of the living.

시편 116:10.content: I believed, therefore I said, “I was greatly afflicted.”

시편 116:11.content: I said in my haste, “All people are liars.”

시편 116:12.content: What will I give to Yahweh for all his benefits toward me?

시편 116:13.content: I will take the cup of salvation, and call on Yahweh’s name.

시편 116:14.content: I will pay my vows to Yahweh, yes, in the presence of all his people.

시편 116:15.content: Precious in Yahweh’s sight is the death of his saints.

시편 116:16.content: Yahweh, truly I am your servant. I am your servant, the son of your servant girl. You have freed me from my chains.

시편 116:17.content: I will offer to you the sacrifice of thanksgiving, and will call on Yahweh’s name.

시편 116:18.content: I will pay my vows to Yahweh, yes, in the presence of all his people,

시편 116:19.content: in the courts of Yahweh’s house, in the middle of you, Jerusalem. Praise Yah!
